title: arenaria aggregata subsp. fontiqueri
intro: Arenaria aggregata subsp. fontiqueri, also known as the mountain sandwort, is a plant species found in the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective against wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Arenaria aggregata subsp. fontiqueri include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune system function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, which can be applied topically to affected areas or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
